summary: Added a new skill for automating Trello boards, cards, and workflows through Composio's Rube MCP integration. Includes setup instructions for connecting Rube MCP and Trello, core workflows for creating cards, managing boards/lists, moving cards, assigning members, searching/filtering cards, and adding comments/attachments. Provides common patterns for ID resolution, pagination, and rate limiting, along with known pitfalls regarding ID requirements, board ID formats, search delays, nested responses, and rate limits.
